children.name: hwDhcpSnpGlobalOption82RemoteIdSysName
children.description: Config Option82 global remote ID as system name,default is disabled.

children.name: hwDhcpSnpFalsePktStatisticTable
children.description: The false packets statistic information table.

children.name: hwDhcpSnpGlobalOption82PktFormatTable
children.description: A table about the packet format of option82.

children.name: hwDhcpSnpGlobalOption82PktFormatEntry
children.description: An entry about the packet format of option82.

children.name: hwDhcpPktRateAlarmEnable
children.description:
Whether to send the DHCP packets rate alarm when the actual rate beyond
             the maximum rate configured and reach the rate threshold,default is disabling.

children.name: hwDhcpSnpGlobalOption82Format
children.description: The format type of Option82,default is hex.

children.name: hwDhcpPktRateAlarmThreshold
children.description:
The threshold of the DHCP packets rate Alarm. When the actual rate
             beyond the maximum rate configured and reach this threshold once, 
             there will be a notification can be sent at the same time,default is 100.

children.name: hwDhcpSnpBindTblAutosave
children.description: Whether to save snooping bind table,default is disabling .

children.name: hwDhcpPktRateDiscardNum
children.description: DHCP packets that discarded for the rate limit.

children.name: hwDhcpSnpBindTblNomatchedArpGlobalAction
children.description:
How to deal with the ARP packets that do not match the DHCP snooping 
             bind table in global view,default is forward.

children.name: hwDhcpSnpTrapRemoteBackupType
children.description: The tranfer protocol for DHCP snooping user-bind table remote backup.

children.name: hwDhcpSnpGlobalOption82PacketFormat
children.description: The format mode of Option82,default is extended.

children.name: hwDhcpDegradeReason
children.description: DHCP degrade reason.

children.name: hwDhcpSnpStaticBindTable
children.description: The snooping static bind table.

children.name: hwDhcpPktRateCheck
children.description: Whether to check the rate of DHCP packets received,default is disabling.

children.name: hwDhcpSnpGlobalOption82RemoteId
children.description: Option82 global remote ID.

children.name: hwDhcpDegradeLevel
children.description: DHCP degrade level.

children.name: hwSnpBindingItemGlobalNum
children.description: The number of binding items on the device.

children.name: hwDhcpSnpBindTable
children.description:
The snooping bind table.You must give out 
                (1)one of the interface index, VLANID and VSIID at least 
                (2)the Mac-address,ip-address,static type
                if you want to create a static bind row of the table,
                dynamic can not be created.

children.name: hwDhcpSnpGlobalOption82CircuitId
children.description: Option82 global circuit ID.

children.name: hwDhcpSnpBindTblNomatchedIpGlobalAction
children.description:
How to deal with the Ip packets that do not match the DHCP snooping 
             bind table in global view,default is forward.

children.name: hwDhcpSnpGlobalThreshold
children.description: DHCP snooping global threshold,default is disabling.
